task_updates.executor_notes: Verified `src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts` now includes `'audio-binding'` in `ParameterType`, exports `AudioBindingValue`, and widens `ParameterDefinition.default` to accept `AudioBindingValue` objects.

Created `src/tools/video-editor/compositions/AudioAnalysisProvider.tsx` with exported `AudioAnalysisData`, `AudioAnalysisContext`, `SILENT_AUDIO_DATA`, `useAudioAnalysisContext()`, and `SyntheticAudioProvider`. Verified the provider acquires `delayRender('Audio analysis')` via a `useState` initializer, releases with `continueRender(handle)` only, implements the empty-clips silent fast path, and passed `npx eslint ...` plus the full `src/tools/video-editor/` vitest module.

Updated both prompt-template surfaces so `useAudioReactive()` and `useAudioParam()` are documented, and widened the edge template types to include `'audio-binding'`. Verified the frontend/edge template edits by inspection, lint, and the full `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/` vitest module; that edge suite still fails in an untouched `ai-generate-effect/index.ts` logger path with `logger.flush is not a function`.

Added explicit `audio-binding` validation/coercion in `validateParams.ts` before the color fallback, and updated `ParameterControls.tsx` to import `AudioBindingValue`, preserve object defaults, and render source/min/max editing with `NumberInput` controls instead of the shared scalar slider. Verified the new control path with lint, the existing `DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` file, and the full `src/tools/video-editor/` vitest module.

Created `src/tools/video-editor/effects/useAudioReactive.ts` with `useAudioReactive()` reading `AudioAnalysisContext` via `useContext()` and falling back to `SILENT_AUDIO_DATA` when no provider data is present. Verified `useAudioParam()` uses plain arithmetic and returns `0` for nullish bindings. Lint passed and the full `src/tools/video-editor/` vitest module still passes.

Wired `AudioAnalysisProvider` around the outer `TimelineRenderer` tree, computed `totalDurationInFrames` with `getTimelineDurationInFrames(config, fps)`, and derived `audioClips` from clips whose track id belongs to an audio track. Verified `effects/index.tsx` remains unmodified via `git diff` and the full `src/tools/video-editor/` vitest module passes with the renderer changes applied.

Inserted `SyntheticAudioProvider` inside `makePreviewComposition()` so the Remotion composition returned to `<Player component={...}>` owns the preview audio context. Verified `EffectCreatorPanelProps` and `ClipPanel.tsx` callers remain unchanged by diff, and the full `src/tools/video-editor/` vitest module passes after the preview composition update.

Updated `src/tools/video-editor/effects/compileEffect.tsx` so `tryCompileWithTransform()` imports `useAudioReactive` and `useAudioParam`, injects them as the 7th and 8th names in the `new Function()` constructor, and passes the matching functions as the 7th and 8th factory arguments. Verified the wiring by inspection and ran the full `src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` file, which still passes.

Added coverage for `useAudioReactive()` and `useAudioParam()`, extended `DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` with compiled audio-hook cases, added audio-binding validation/UI tests, added `AudioAnalysisProvider` lifecycle/data tests, and added a direct `templates.ts` smoke test that imports `AVAILABLE_GLOBALS`. Also updated the edge entrypoint test harness to mock the Fireworks SSE fetch path and logger flushing. Verified a temporary repro test for the compiled audio-reactive bug path, deleted it after it passed, then reran the full `src/tools/video-editor/` module (`29` files, `105` tests passed) and the full `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/` module (`2` files, `7` tests passed).

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the type union includes `'audio-binding'`, `AudioBindingValue` is exported, and `ParameterDefinition.default` accepts `AudioBindingValue`.

Confirmed `AudioAnalysisProvider` creates its Remotion handle with `useState(() => delayRender('Audio analysis'))`, never references `cancelRender`, calls `continueRender(handle)` for release/cleanup, and returns silent analysis immediately when `clips.length === 0`.

Confirmed both `src/tools/video-editor/effects/effectPromptTemplate.ts` and `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts` document `useAudioReactive` and `useAudioParam`, and the edge template `ParameterType` now includes `'audio-binding'`.

Confirmed `validateAndCoerceParams` has an explicit `audio-binding` branch before the color fallback, `ParameterControls.tsx` imports `AudioBindingValue`, and the audio-binding UI uses `NumberInput` for min/max rather than `Slider`.

Confirmed `useAudioReactive()` reads `AudioAnalysisContext` with `useContext()` and falls back to `SILENT_AUDIO_DATA`, while `useAudioParam()` uses direct arithmetic and returns `0` when the binding is undefined or null.

Confirmed `TimelineRenderer` now wraps the outermost `AbsoluteFill` with `AudioAnalysisProvider`, and `git diff -- src/tools/video-editor/effects/index.tsx` is empty so `wrapWithEffect` and `wrapWithClipEffects` remain untouched.

Confirmed `SyntheticAudioProvider` is inside `makePreviewComposition()`'s returned composition component, wrapping the preview content before it is handed to `<Player component={PreviewComposition}>`, and no prop or caller changes were made outside `EffectCreatorPanel.tsx`.

Confirmed `compileEffect.tsx` adds `useAudioReactive` and `useAudioParam` as the 7th and 8th parameters in both the `new Function()` constructor and the `factory(...)` call, and the full `DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` file passes after the change.

Confirmed the existing `DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` suite still passes with the new audio-reactive cases, `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.test.ts` directly imports `AVAILABLE_GLOBALS` and asserts `useAudioReactive` plus `useAudioParam`, all new tests pass, and both full vitest modules now pass: `src/tools/video-editor/` and `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/`.
